summary: Iteration 56: Restricted Bone Height Logic Testing - 22/22 tests PASSED (100%). All features verified: P1/P2 grouping, bone type bypass, diameter filtering, sorting, boundary conditions.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (bone_height <= 10 triggers restricted): PASS - bone_height=10 returns restricted_bone_height=True
Feature 2 (bone_height=11 does NOT trigger): PASS - normal flow without restricted flag
Feature 3 (Restricted Bone Height procedure triggers): PASS - procedure triggers even with bone_height=15
Feature 4 (P1 contains 4 systems): PASS - BioHorizons Tapered Short, BioHorizons Tapered Short Conical RBT, Bredent Copa Sky, Dentsply Sirona Ankylos C/X
Feature 5 (P1 filtered by diameter): PASS - narrow width (5mm) filters out BioHorizons systems (4.6mm+), keeps Copa Sky (4.0mm)
Feature 6 (P2 excludes P1 systems): PASS - no overlap between P1 and P2
Feature 7 (P2 length <= 8mm): PASS - all P2 implants have length <= 8mm
Feature 8 (P2 sorted by shortest length then alphabetically): PASS - verified sorting order
Feature 9 (Bone type bypass): PASS - D1, D2, D3, D4 all return same systems for restricted height
Feature 10 (Normal flow still works): PASS - bone_height >= 11 uses normal bone type filtering
seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on suggest-auto endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Restricted Bone Height logic fully implemented and tested. Key implementation at server.py line 3854-3950. Logic: (1) is_restricted_height = bone_height <= 10 OR 'Restricted Bone Height' in procedures, (2) P1 systems: BioHorizons|Tapered Short, BioHorizons|Tapered Short Conical RBT, Bredent|Copa Sky, Dentsply Sirona|Ankylos C/X - filtered by diameter only, (3) P2 systems: all other systems with length <= 8mm, filtered by diameter, sorted by shortest length then alphabetically, (4) Bone type filtering is bypassed in restricted mode. Diameter ranges: <5mm→3.0-3.5, <6mm→3.75-4.0, <7mm→4.0-4.5, >=7mm→4.5-6.0.

tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto: 200 - Restricted bone height logic working correctly

trigger_conditions.restricted_bone_height_procedure: Triggers restricted logic regardless of bone_height

restricted_bone_height_verified.p1_filtering: Filtered by diameter only (no bone type, no length filter)
restricted_bone_height_verified.p2_filtering: All other systems with length <= 8mm, filtered by diameter, requires indication
restricted_bone_height_verified.p2_sorting: By shortest length first, then alphabetically by brand/system
restricted_bone_height_verified.bone_type_bypass: D1, D2, D3, D4 all return same results in restricted mode
